name: Combined Final Prediction
description: The definitive forecast combining two signal layers: (1) Ensemble model base scores from historical election data (Niyamasabha 2011-2021 + Loksabha 2024), and (2) Reporter TV public survey ratings (140 constituencies, 1-10 scale). Highly rated MLAs (8+) get a +3% incumbent boost; poorly rated (<4) get a -3.5% penalty. 0 incumbents boosted, 0 penalized by survey sentiment.
